channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Lynn Ban, star of Netflix reality show, dies at 52 after emergency surgery
item.description: Lynn Ban, who starred in Netflix's reality show "Bling Empire: New York," has died weeks after a skiing accident and emergency brain surgery.
item.dc:creator: Emily Smith, KTLA 5

item.title: Man says he was behind some of the viral googly eyes on public art in Oregon
item.description: A man in the central Oregon city of Bend says he was responsible for some of the googly eyes placed on sculptures there.
item.dc:creator: Claire Rush, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: North Dakota’s overturned abortion ban won’t be in effect during appeal, court rules
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — North Dakota’s abortion ban will not be enforced while the state appeals an earlier decision that found it unconstitutional, the state's highest court ruled Friday. That appeal has yet to fully play out in the state Supreme Court after a judge struck down the law in September.
item.dc:creator: JACK DURA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Long Island’s last duck farm weighs closure after outbreak leads to killing of entire flock
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York’s Long Island was once synonymous with “duck” in the culinary world. Now it may lose its last commercial farm. The avian flu outbreak that has led to the slaughter of millions of birds at U.S.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump visits Los Angeles, tours wildfire damage
item.description: President Donald Trump visited Los Angeles on Friday afternoon to tour the devastation left by several deadly wildfires that broke out earlier this month, and California Gov. Gavin Newsom was the first to welcome him. Air Force One touched down at LAX around 2:55 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Brawl over Pokémon cards breaks out at California Costco
item.description: The fight, captured on video by X user DisguisedToast, unfolded on Jan. 16 at the Costco in Atwater Village, the Los Angeles Times reported.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, Fox 5

item.title: Vance tells March for Life it's a 'blessing to fight for the unborn' during first week in office
item.description: JD Vance told the March for Life crowd Friday he wants to bring back a focus on families in the United States with President's Trump's new administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida man pleads guilty to assaulting American Airlines gate agent
item.description: A Florida man pleaded guilty in federal court after he assaulted an American Airlines gate agent at Dallas-Fort Worth International Airport, according to online court documents.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump pumps coal as answer to AI power needs but any boost could be short-lived
item.description: President Donald Trump's return to office could bring some temporary relief to the beleaguered U.S. coal industry.
item.dc:creator: Mead Gruver And Matthew Brown, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Oklahoma wants federal inmate transferred so he can be put to death
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Oklahoma's top prosecutor asked the federal Bureau of Prisons to transfer an inmate to state custody so that he could be executed for his role in the kidnapping and killing of a 77-year-old woman in 1999.
item.dc:creator: SEAN MURPHY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Homeowners in Palisades Fire area angered by bank's decision
item.description: With the devastating Palisades Fire still smoldering in California, Lisa Pelton and some of her neighbors in Mandeville Canyon received an unpleasant notice from their bank: Their home equity lines of credit were being slashed.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KRON4

item.title: Hearing set for Kash Patel nomination to lead FBI
item.description: Kash Patel, President Trump’s nominee to lead the FBI, is expected to appear before the Senate Judiciary Committee on Thursday. Patel held numerous national security roles during the first Trump administration but would be a new face at the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: FBI arrests suspect in killing of Vermont Border Patrol agent
item.description: The FBI announced the arrest of a suspect Friday in the killing of U.S. Border Patrol Agent David "Chris" Maland near the Vermont-Canada border.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gen Z is most challenging generation to work with, according to survey
item.description: (KRON) -- The younger generation has always had a tough time proving itself to older generations in the workplace. Back in the 1990s, older workers spoke disparagingly of "20-something" Gen Xers making their way into the workplace at the time.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Woman finds police-issued rifle, bulletproof vests in Hertz rental
item.description: A woman was shocked after she opened the trunk of her rental car to find a police-issued assault rifle.
item.dc:creator: Kenzie Finch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JetBlue sued after 'watermelon' sized ice block drops through roof
item.description: A couple is suing a major U.S. airline after a block of ice came crashing through the roof of their home last year.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, NewsNation

item.title: What to know about the ruling blocking Trump's order on birthright citizenship
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — President Donald Trump's executive order denying U.S. citizenship to the children of parents living in the country illegally has faced the first of what will be many legal tests. It didn't fare well.
item.dc:creator: GENE JOHNSON and MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ford recalls over 270,000 Broncos and Mavericks: Here's why
item.description: Ford Motor Co. is recalling 272,827 Broncos and Mavericks due to a power problem that can cause vehicles to stop unexpectedly or fail to start.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Flame thrower and 'flusher' truck: Southern cities get creative to clear snow, ice
item.description: Days after a winter storm dropped ice and record-breaking snow, cleanup efforts were underway Thursday in several major Southern cities such as New Orleans, where crews were removing snow the same way they remove trash, drink cups and plastic beads after Mardi Gras.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: ICE agents raid NJ seafood store, detain US military veteran
item.description: "I asked them [the agents] what documentation they were looking for, and they said it was a license or a passport.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, Fox 5

item.title: Trump ‘very surprised’ by Murkowski, Collins votes against Hegseth
item.description: President Donald Trump said Friday that he wasn't expecting Republican Sens. Lisa Murkowski (Alaska) and Susan Collins (Maine) to vote against his controversial nominee for secretary of Defense, Army veteran and former Fox News host Pete Hegseth.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: JD Vance speaks at March for Life rally in Washington
item.description: A rally is scheduled for noon on the National Mall and we expect a string of Republicans to speak about their anti-abortion plans.
item.dc:creator: Libbey Dean, NewsNation

item.title: Illegal immigrant in Texas wanted for allegedly raping child in Mexico repatriated back to native country
item.description: An illegal immigrant wanted in Mexico for allegedly raping a child was repatriated back to his country after entering the U.S. four times illegally since 2002.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tennessee Republican proposes amendment to allow Trump to serve third term
item.description: Like other U.S. presidents, Trump is barred from running for a third White House term by the 22nd Amendment to the Constitution.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: Resale prices for iPhones 'with TikTok installed' soar up to $50,000
item.description: TikTok is no longer available in the App Store as of Thursday, however there's still a way to get back on the platform – for a price.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, ABC 4

item.title: Activists to 'resist' Trump through know-your-rights campaign
item.description: The pulse of El Paso’s immigrant community can be felt through the calls streaming into a small white “BNHR” building on Piedras Street over the past few days.
item.dc:creator: Julian Resendiz, Fox 5

item.title: 6 planets to align in the night sky: Here's when
item.description: You might want to keep your eyes on the skies through next month: Six planets will align in January and February.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, Fox 5

item.title: Trump signs order directing release of JFK assassination files
item.description: The order directs the director of national intelligence and attorney general to present a plan within 15 days for the “full and complete release of records relating to the assassination of President John F. Kennedy.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Trump pulls security for Pompeo, others amid Iran threats
item.description: President Trump pulled security protection for former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and his top aide, Brian Hook, both of whom have faced threats from Iran amid their hard-line positions toward the Islamic Republic, multiple outlets reported on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: California will spend $2.5 billion to help the Los Angeles area recover from wildfires
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California will spend $2.5 billion to help the Los Angeles area recover from recent deadly wildfires under a relief package signed Thursday by Democratic Gov. Gavin Newsom.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIE AUSTIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Judge to weigh genetic evidence and search warrants in University of Idaho quadruple murder case
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Attorneys for a man charged with murder in connection with the killings of four University of Idaho students are asking a judge to throw out most of the evidence in the case because they say it all hinges on an unconstitutional genetic investigation process.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A federal judge temporarily blocks Trump’s executive order redefining birthright citizenship
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — A federal judge on Thursday temporarily blocked President Donald Trump’s executive order denying U.S. citizenship to the children of parents living in the country illegally, calling it “blatantly unconstitutional” during the first hearing in a multi-state effort challenging the order.
item.dc:creator: GENE JOHNSON and MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Experts worry that Trump's Jan. 6 pardons will legitimize political violence, embolden extremists
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After President Donald Trump pardoned around 1,500 Jan. 6 Capitol rioters on Monday, far-right activists cheered the move and said it strengthened their loyalty to him. Some also borrowed from the president’s own rhetoric, calling for retribution.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON and LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Musk mocks Nazi salute accusations with puns
item.description: Elon Musk referenced Adolf Hitler and other Nazi leaders in a social media post filled with puns early Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Samsung S25 Lineup: Lighter, Faster, More AI
item.description: Samsung held their latest unpacked event in the heart of Silicon Valley in San Jose. It's where AI is a major buzzword and that was certainly the case up on stage as Samsung unveiled its Galaxy S25 lineup of smartphones.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump says he may withhold federal aid for Los Angeles fires
item.description: The president repeated false claims that the state's fish conservation efforts in the northern part of the state are responsible for fire hydrants running dry in urban areas.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jury convicts serial killer truck driver in 2007 murder
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — It took a Marion Superior Court jury less than 90 minutes to convict a serial killer truck driver of the murder of an Indianapolis woman more than 17 years ago.
item.dc:creator: Russ McQuaid, WFLA, NBC
